ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tracy Roberts for Thomas Leonardis (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it is very troubled by what has happened in this case, that it had all kinds of ideas on how to proceed including having the Administrator give back the money, file receipts and explain why what happened, happened, that it expects the Administrator and the Attorney to work closely together, and raised the issue of whether this was a way of settling a claim or a contest to the estate. Ms. Roberts apologized to the Court, stated that it was a misunderstanding, that it was not the intent of her Client, that the Decedent left her Client his entire estate and that her Client in good faith turned around and made gifts. Ms. Roberts also stated that when her Client was thinking about doing this, they talked about it and this is where she thinks the misunderstanding happened, that her Client thought he had the authority to do this and provided history. The Court questions why it shouldn't continue this for her Client to appear. Ms. Roberts stated that she does not feel the matter should be continued for her Client to appear because she feels that her Client didn't do it in bad faith, that the company holding the after discovered assets indicated that they will distribute them in December, that they will then turn around and close the estate, and that she has filed the receipts for all of the individuals who received gifts. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for February 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
